rows.name: Home Best Sellers Section
rows.title: Best sellers highlighted through backend storefront flags.
rows.description: This section groups products using the real storefront best-seller flag and live inventory-ready products.

rows.name: Home Category Section
rows.title: Category groupings now come from the live product catalog.
rows.description: The store navigation, category rail, and category cards derive from active backend product and storefront profile records.

rows.name: Home CTA Section
rows.title: Storefront browsing is now running on the backend product catalog.
rows.description: Home sections, category browsing, product detail, brand highlights, and catalog filters derive from backend storefront data with a safe fallback copy path.

rows.name: Home Featured Section
rows.title: Feature-section products curated in the product publishing profile.
rows.description: These cards stay fully backend-driven, including category mapping, prices, inventory, and real product imagery.

rows.name: Home Featured Labels Section
rows.title: Brand labels assembled from flagged live products.
rows.description: This area groups brands from the actual catalog instead of fixed sample content.

rows.name: Home New Arrivals Section
rows.title: New arrivals curated directly from publishing options.
rows.description: Fresh storefront introductions are driven by active backend publishing rows rather than static page content.

rows.name: Trust Note Delivery
rows.title: Design-first flow
rows.description: Cart and checkout stay styled for the shopper journey while product discovery and merchandising run on live catalog data.

rows.name: Trust Note Editorial
rows.title: Editorial curation
rows.description: Built as a premium storefront with backend-driven product curation, polished hierarchy, and campaign-style entry sections.

rows.name: Trust Note Shell
rows.title: Shell preserved
rows.description: The menu, category rail, footer, and storefront sections stay aligned while reading dynamic copy and product data from the backend.

tables.name: products

CREATE TABLE `products` (

  `has_variants` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  `cost_price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `tax_id` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_featured` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uuid` (`uuid`),
  UNIQUE KEY `slug` (`slug`),
  UNIQUE KEY `sku` (`sku`),
  KEY `fk_products_brand` (`brand_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_category` (`category_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_group` (`product_group_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_type` (`product_type_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_unit` (`unit_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_hsn` (`hsn_code_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_style` (`style_id`),
  KEY `fk_products_tax` (`tax_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_brand` FOREIGN KEY (`brand_id`) REFERENCES `common_brands` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_category` FOREIGN KEY (`category_id`) REFERENCES `common_product_categories` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_group` FOREIGN KEY (`product_group_id`) REFERENCES `common_product_groups` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_hsn` FOREIGN KEY (`hsn_code_id`) REFERENCES `common_hsn_codes` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_style` FOREIGN KEY (`style_id`) REFERENCES `common_styles` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_tax` FOREIGN KEY (`tax_id`) REFERENCES `common_taxes` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_type` FOREIGN KEY (`product_type_id`) REFERENCES `common_product_types` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_products_unit` FOREIGN KEY (`unit_id`) REFERENCES `common_units` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
